title: Tyto
content:

{{Quote|Tyto, let's find a camp for the night.|Sarge|<ref name="Orders" />}}
'''Tyto''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], who served in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] as a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. A quiet and skilled [[Sniper/Legends|sniper]] who wore [[Katarn-class commando armor/Legends|''Katarn''-class]] [[Commando/Legends|commando]] [[Armor/Legends|armor]], Tyto served with [[Aiwha Squad]] during the later portion of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], along with fellow commandos [[Zag]], [[Di'kut]], and [[Clone Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Sarge (clone commando)|Sarge]]. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Tyto and his [[Aiwha/Legends|Aiwha]] [[Squad/Legends|squadmates]] were involved in the [[Battle of Garqi (Clone Wars)|Battle]] of [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]], where they were tasked with searching for civilian refugees following a Republic [[Bomb/Legends|bombing]] campaign. Discovering a [[Youngling/Legends|child]] by the name of [[Evan]], the four clones escorted the boy to a nearby refugee camp overseen by [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Traavis]]. There, the squad received the command to carry out [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] from [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], and Tyto opened fire on his former [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] in unison with his clone brothers, [[Death/Legends|killing]] Traavis.

==Biography==
{{Quote|Aiwhas! ''Now!|Sarge, ordering Tyto and the other members of Aiwha Squad to attack|<ref name="Orders" />}}
Tyto was the name taken by a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]. Born on the [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]],<ref name="DB Clone troopers" /> located in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] region,<ref name="The Essential Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> Tyto was created to serve as a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]].<ref name="Orders" /> When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|broke out]] between the Galactic Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Tyto was deployed from Kamino and brought into active service within the Grand [[Army/Legends|Army's]] [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]], under the command of [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Arligan Zey]].<ref name="TZ">''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]''</ref>

By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], the third year of the Clone Wars, Tyto was serving as a member of [[Aiwha Squad]], a [[Special forces/Legends|special forces]] [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of clone [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] that also included the commandos [[Zag]] and [[Di'kut]], and was lead by [[Clone Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Sarge (clone commando)|Sarge]]. In the final [[Galactic Standard Calendar|days]] of the war, Tyto and his clone brothers were sent to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] of [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]], where following a Republic [[Bomb/Legends|bombing]] campaign against the Separatist presence, [[Aiwha/Legends|Aiwha]] Squad was tasked with searching for survivors. Upon investigating a ruined [[Farm/Legends|farmhouse]], Tyto and the others came across a [[Youngling/Legends|young child]] by the name of [[Evan]]. With his [[Parent/Legends|parents]] [[Death/Legends|dead]], the responsibility of seeing the boy to the nearby [[Garqi refugee camp|refugee camp]] fell to the commandos; Evan, however, was reluctant to go with the clones and attempted to flee their custody and return to his damaged home, accidentally stumbling upon a [[OG-9 homing spider droid/Legends|OG-9 homing spider droid]]. Tyto and the other members of Aiwha Squad attacked the [[spider droid]], destroying it and saving Evan, earning the young boy's trust and respect.<ref name="Orders" />

[[File:Aiwha_66.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Tyto and Aiwha Squad execute Order 66]]
As night fell over the Garqian wilderness, Tyto was tasked with locating a suitable location for a campsite. Once settled in, he sat with his brothers and the orphan boy around a fire, while Sarge took some time to explain the life of a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] to the curious youth. When the [[Star/Legends|sun]] rose the following morning, Tyto and the others carried on until they reached the refugee encampment overseen by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Traavis]]. Aiwha Squad's commandos were congratulated by the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] for their efforts, and he informed them of the death of General [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]]—the [[Supreme Commander of the Droid Armies/Legends|Supreme Commander]] of the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]]—at the [[Limb/Legends|hands]] of [[High Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. The good news was short-lived, however, by the issuing of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]],<ref name="Orders" /> one of the one hundred and fifty [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|contingency orders]] of the Grand Army and which detailed that the Jedi had been declared traitors to the Republic marked for execution on sight. Having come directly from [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]],<ref name="Republic Commando: True Colors">''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]''</ref> Sarge ordered the squad to open fire on General Traavis; Tyto and his squadmates complied, [[Blaster/Legends|shooting]] and killing the Jedi General in accordance with the Chancellor's order.<ref name="Orders" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|…that's ''Tyto''...|Sarge, introducing Evan to Tyto|<ref name="Orders" />}}
Tyto had a taciturn demeanor, a sharp contrast to his Aiwha Squad comrade, Di'kut, who was a sarcastic talker.<ref name="Orders" /> Unlike many clones who preferred to remain clean shaven,<ref name="TZ" /> Tyto sported a neatly-kept mustache and beard. His right bicep was also adorned with a [[black]]-[[Color/Legends|colored]] [[Tattoo/Legends|tattoo]] of a Mandalorian [[Mythosaur/Legends|mythosaur]] [[Skeleton/Legends|skull]]. Tyto appeared to show a preference for the color black, marking his [[Katarn-class commando armor/Legends|''Katarn''-class commando armor]] with custom stripes of black paint. In addition, he equipped the shoulder plates of his armor with additional [[Quarrel/Legends|rounds]] for his [[DC-17m Interchangeable Weapon System/Legends|DC-17m Interchangeable Weapon System's]] [[Sniper rifle/Legends|sniper rifle]] attachment, which Tyto favored in combat and displayed considerable skill with as a [[Sniper/Legends|sniper]].<ref name="Orders" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tyto first appeared in the [[2005]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] story, [[Orders (comic story)|''Orders'']], from the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 4|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume'' 4]] of the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Clone Wars Adventures'']] comic series. Tyto was drawn by the [[Fillbach Brothers|Fillbach brothers]], [[Matthew Fillbach|Matthew]] and [[Shawn Fillbach|Shawn]], and the story was [[Author/Legends|authored]] by [[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]], though Tyto himself received no dialogue. Oddly, while the other clone commandos of Aiwha Squad were given entries in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', Tyto was not similarly featured in the [[2008]] reference book.

==Appearances==
*{{CWACite|4|Orders (comic story)}} {{1st}}
